text:
Lingling Wang, Ed.D.
Lingling Wang is the Registrar and Dean of Academic Services at Duke Kunshan University, where she oversees the operations of the Registrar’s Office and provides leadership in academic services. Her role ensures smooth support for undergraduate students in areas such as academic advising, academic policy management, and addressing student petitions and appeals. She also plays a critical role in overseeing the Undergraduate Bulletin, and ensuring compliance with the accreditation standards set by the Jiangsu Department of Education and the Ministry of Education in China.
Lingling’s expertise spans both the administrative and academic realms, drawing on over a decade of experience in joint-venture university settings. Since joining DKU in 2012, she has played an important role in the operation of the Global Learning Semester program. Her subsequent experience in the Registrar’s Office has equipped her with extensive expertise in managing student cases, overseeing academic policies, and ensuring smooth operations.
Lingling received her Bachelor’s degree in Business English from Nanjing Normal University, a Master’s degree in Simultaneous Interpretation from Beijing Foreign Studies University, and a Doctor of Education from the University of Southern California.
